allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- nvm ---"; if\(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\){ Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -Directory | Select-Object Name }; Write-Output "--- where via cmd ---"; cmd /c "where node 2>nul"; cmd /c "where npm 2>nul")

PowerShell($machine = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\); $user = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $env:Path = "$machine;$user"; npm install next@14; Write-Output "--- installed next version ---"; npm ls next)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if\($r.Content -match "CỔNG PHÁP LUẬT QUỐC GIA"\){ Write-Output "CONTENT OK: tìm thấy tiêu đề trang" } else { Write-Output "CONTENT: không thấy tiêu đề \(xem đoạn đầu\)"; $r.Content.Substring\(0,400\) } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tam-nhin" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\) tren cong 3000"; $ok=$true; break }catch{ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "Chua san sang" })

PowerShell(git config --global user.name "nhanhl"; git config --global user.email "hoangluongnhan@gmail.com"; Write-Output "--- Xac nhan ---"; Write-Output "user.name  = $\(git config --global user.name\)"; Write-Output "user.email = $\(git config --global user.email\)")
